context: Tests whether the agent reads the provided brand vault files (voice.md, palette.json, visual.md) and correctly incorporates them into the ads brief — specifically into the Tone guardrails section (reflecting voice.md dos/don'ts) and Image direction section (reflecting palette.json colors and visual.md photography style).

checklist.name: Tone DO list from voice.md
checklist.description: Tone guardrails DO section contains at least two items drawn from voice.md (e.g., discovery framing, education angle, community reference)

checklist.name: Tone DON'T list from voice.md
checklist.description: Tone guardrails DON'T section contains at least two items drawn from voice.md (e.g., no discount framing, no urgency pressure, no generic lifestyle imagery)

checklist.name: Vocabulary compliance in copy
checklist.description: Brief copy does NOT use any of the prohibited words listed in voice.md: 'premium', 'artisanal', 'luxury', or 'finest'

checklist.name: Image direction — Color from palette.json
checklist.description: Image direction Color field references the brand's warm brown/caramel palette (e.g., espresso brown, #2C1810, warm caramel) rather than generic color descriptions

checklist.name: Image direction — What to avoid from visual.md
checklist.description: Image direction 'What to avoid' field reflects at least one item from visual.md (e.g., no studio white backgrounds, no stock-photo interiors, no cool-toned environments)

checklist.name: Image direction — Subject/Mood from visual.md
checklist.description: Image direction Subject and/or Mood fields reflect the visual style in visual.md (e.g., warm natural light, rustic surfaces, coffee as subject)

checklist.name: Tone guardrails section present
checklist.description: Brief contains a Tone guardrails section with both a DO list and a DON'T list

checklist.name: Image direction all 5 fields
checklist.description: Image direction subsection contains all five fields: Subject, Mood, Color, Type treatment, and What to avoid

checklist.name: Output file path
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/northbrew-discovery.md (or equivalent vault path)

checklist.name: Hook copy reflects brand voice
checklist.description: Hook variants use discovery/education/community angles (as specified in voice.md) rather than discount or urgency framing
